creator: d8zNeCFG@aon.at
text:
(In reply to Oleg Sidorkin from comment #1)

Thank you for this pointer.

After the patch is applied the install then fails with conflicts to devel/py-nbformat. It turns out that both ports install files belonging to the test infrastructure, e.g., /usr/local/lib/python3.9/site-packages/scripts/__init__.py. For devel/py-black this can be found (after building) as follows:

[0]% cd /usr/tmp/ports/devel/py-black/work-py39/stage
[0]# find . ! -type d | egrep -v 'black|blib2to3'
./usr/local/lib/python3.9/site-packages/scripts/__init__.py
./usr/local/lib/python3.9/site-packages/scripts/check_pre_commit_rev_in_example.py
./usr/local/lib/python3.9/site-packages/scripts/check_version_in_basics_example.py
./usr/local/lib/python3.9/site-packages/scripts/diff_shades_gha_helper.py
./usr/local/lib/python3.9/site-packages/scripts/fuzz.py
./usr/local/lib/python3.9/site-packages/scripts/__pycache__/__init__.cpython-39.pyc
./usr/local/lib/python3.9/site-packages/scripts/__pycache__/fuzz.cpython-39.pyc
./usr/local/lib/python3.9/site-packages/scripts/__pycache__/__init__.cpython-39.opt-1.pyc
./usr/local/lib/python3.9/site-packages/scripts/__pycache__/check_pre_commit_rev_in_example.cpython-39.pyc
./usr/local/lib/python3.9/site-packages/scripts/__pycache__/check_version_in_basics_example.cpython-39.pyc

./usr/local/lib/python3.9/site-packages/scripts/__pycache__/check_pre_commit_rev_in_example.cpython-39.opt-1.pyc
./usr/local/lib/python3.9/site-packages/scripts/__pycache__/fuzz.cpython-39.opt-1.pyc
./usr/local/lib/python3.9/site-packages/scripts/__pycache__/check_version_in_basics_example.cpython-39.opt-1.pyc
./usr/local/lib/python3.9/site-packages/scripts/__pycache__/diff_shades_gha_helper.cpython-39.opt-1.pyc
./usr/local/lib/python3.9/site-packages/tests/__init__.py
./usr/local/lib/python3.9/site-packages/tests/conftest.py
./usr/local/lib/python3.9/site-packages/tests/optional.py
./usr/local/lib/python3.9/site-packages/tests/test_format.py
./usr/local/lib/python3.9/site-packages/tests/test_ipynb.py
./usr/local/lib/python3.9/site-packages/tests/test_no_ipynb.py
./usr/local/lib/python3.9/site-packages/tests/test_trans.py
./usr/local/lib/python3.9/site-packages/tests/util.py
./usr/local/lib/python3.9/site-packages/tests/__pycache__/__init__.cpython-39.pyc
./usr/local/lib/python3.9/site-packages/tests/__pycache__/conftest.cpython-39.pyc
./usr/local/lib/python3.9/site-packages/tests/__pycache__/optional.cpython-39.pyc
./usr/local/lib/python3.9/site-packages/tests/__pycache__/test_no_ipynb.cpython-39.pyc
./usr/local/lib/python3.9/site-packages/tests/__pycache__/test_format.cpython-39.pyc
./usr/local/lib/python3.9/site-packages/tests/__pycache__/test_ipynb.cpython-39.pyc
./usr/local/lib/python3.9/site-packages/tests/__pycache__/__init__.cpython-39.opt-1.pyc
./usr/local/lib/python3.9/site-packages/tests/__pycache__/test_trans.cpython-39.pyc
./usr/local/lib/python3.9/site-packages/tests/__pycache__/util.cpython-39.pyc
./usr/local/lib/python3.9/site-packages/tests/__pycache__/conftest.cpython-39.opt-1.pyc

./usr/local/lib/python3.9/site-packages/tests/__pycache__/test_format.cpython-39.opt-1.pyc
./usr/local/lib/python3.9/site-packages/tests/__pycache__/test_ipynb.cpython-39.opt-1.pyc
./usr/local/lib/python3.9/site-packages/tests/__pycache__/test_no_ipynb.cpython-39.opt-1.pyc

./usr/local/lib/python3.9/site-packages/tests/__pycache__/util.cpython-39.opt-1.pyc

These files were not installed in the previous version py39-black-22.8.0.

-- Martin
